Package index

Functions

cloppearSnSp()
Binomial confidence interval, Clopper-Pearson method.
estimateSnSp()
Estimate Sensitivity and Specificity
estimateSnSpControl()
control values for estimateSnSp
updateAlpha()
Update alpha values for existing simulation

Helper Functions

.beta_parm()
Convert Beta Paramaterizations
.cell_counts()
Obtain cell counts
.create_triangle_dist()
Create Triangular Distribution
.emp_hpd()
Calculate the empirical hpd.
.get_simulated_values()
Get Simulated Values
.get_values()
Optimization of Sensitivity and Specificity
.minimize_cell()
minimize cell

S3 & S4 classes

cp-class cp
cp-class
snsp-class snsp
snsp-class

Data Sets

data1
Data set for Example 1 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data2
Data set for Example 2 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data3
Data set for Example 3 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data4
Data set for Example 4 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data5
Data set for Example 5 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data6
Data set for Example 6 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data7
Data set for Example 7 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
data8
Data set for Example 8 in vignette "DiagTestKit Examples"
dat_dichot
Assay Validation Sensitivity and Specificity (Diagnostic Kit Format) example from CVB Data Guide.
dat_infal
Counts data used in vignette "DiagTestKit GettingStarted" section 4
